summary: Iteration 26 — Admin kill-switch for Fantasy + Predictions. Full E2E (backend + admin UI + user-facing paused screens). 12/12 backend tests pass; admin UI flow, both ServicePausedScreens, gating, audit log, re-enable, idempotency, leaderboard-not-gated all verified. Both services re-enabled at end. ONE minor UI bug found: 'View leaderboard' link in ServicePausedScreen points to a non-existent route.

ui_bugs.issue: leaderboardHref = '/leaderboard' (fantasy) and '/predictions/leaderboard' (predictions) — neither route exists in App.js. The actual route is '/leaderboards' (plural). Console warning: 'No routes matched location /leaderboard'. Clicking the 'View leaderboard' button from the paused screen lands on a blank page (only nav + footer).

design_issues.screen: Admin dashboard (pre-existing, not introduced by this iteration)
issues: React hydration warning: <span> inside <option> in GrantCardForm select (Admin.jsx around line 192). Not blocking, but spams console errors on every admin page render.

action_items: Fix ServicePausedScreen.jsx: change leaderboardHref from '/leaderboard' to '/leaderboards' (and from '/predictions/leaderboard' to '/leaderboards' or whichever real route exists for the predictions leaderboard). Currently the 'View leaderboard' link from the paused screen takes users to a blank page.
(Optional, pre-existing) Fix the <option><span> hydration warning in Admin.jsx GrantCardForm select — wrap option text directly, no inline span.
critical_code_review_comments: service_controls.py is clean — _id excluded everywhere, 423 detail object well-formed, audit log written with old/new diff.
Public /api/services/status correctly returns enabled=true defaults for missing docs (fresh DB safe).
ensure_enabled() is awaited correctly in all four guarded endpoints; ordering verified (gate runs before business logic but AFTER pydantic body validation — that's standard FastAPI and is fine).
Frontend serviceStatus.js uses module-scoped cache + 60s poll + broadcast pattern — sound. refreshServiceStatus() invalidates correctly.
ServicePausedScreen route hrefs are wrong (see ui_bugs above) — only real defect.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (1 broken link in paused-screen CTA, otherwise all flows green)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@cloudypitch.com / CloudyAdmin2026! (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Test user signed up dynamically per run.
seed_data_creation: None persisted. Both services flipped during tests then reset to enabled=true, shutdown_reason='' in test_zz_final_reset and again in the Playwright re-enable step. Verified clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service-controls kill-switch verified end-to-end. Backend 423 contract: detail={code:'service_paused', service, reason}. Public status endpoint shape: {fantasy:{enabled,shutdown_reason,updated_at}, predictions:{...}}. data-testids in use: service-controls-card, service-row-{kind}, service-toggle-{kind}, service-reason-{kind}, service-save-reason-{kind}, service-paused-{kind}, service-paused-reason, service-paused-leaderboard-link, service-paused-home-link, service-paused-title. Pydantic validates body BEFORE the route guard — so for the 423 gate tests, payload must be schema-valid (otherwise you'll get 422). See test_iteration26.py for valid minimal bodies for /fantasy/squad, /fantasy/transfers/buy, /fantasy/transfers/spend, /wc/games/{id}/enter, /predictions.
rca_of_the_issue: BROKEN LEADERBOARD LINK — ServicePausedScreen.jsx line 13 hardcodes '/leaderboard' (singular) and '/predictions/leaderboard'. App.js line 66 declares the real route as '/leaderboards' (plural). React Router emits 'No routes matched location' and renders the Layout shell with no content. Repro: pause fantasy as admin → visit /fantasy → click 'View leaderboard' → blank page. Fix: change leaderboardHref to '/leaderboards' for both branches (or whatever the canonical leaderboard route is). One-line frontend change.
